channel.title: Projects on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Home

item.title: Project 2: The Battle of Neighborhoods
item.description: I took the IBM Data Science courses on Coursera. This is the capstone project for the IBM Data Science certification. This project requires me to come up with an idea to leverage the Foursquare location data to explore or compare neighborhoods or cities of your choice or to come up with a problem that you can use the Foursquare location data to solve. I want to know if in Los Angeles, if someone is looking to open a coffee shop, where would I recommend that they open it?

item.title: Project 1: Book Rating Prediction
item.description: This is my Capstone project. I and my teammate were curious about how differently the Goodreads and Amazon users review a book, so below we Obtained and clean large Amazon and Goodreads datasets. Utilized multiprocessing to maximize CPU utilization to drastically speed up the cleaning process by 100 times. Utilized EDA to explore the characteristics of the datasets and to choose suitable algorithms for the datasets. Utilized Latent Dirichlet allocation (LDA) to improve the accuracy of the predictions.

item.title: Datacamp projects
item.description: Project Task ————————– —————————————————————————————————– Analyzing Police Activity Analyzing some impacts on police behavior ————————– —————————————————————————————————– Predicting Credit Card Approvals Building an automatic credit card approval predictor using machine learning techniques, just like the real banks do
